pi_items.source: Custom user-defined identifier. Verification: Appears consistently in export_result.sh and verifier.py as the expected BlobStore name for this task. GeoServer allows arbitrary BlobStore names.

Custom user-defined path. Verification: setup_geoserver.sh line 11 confirms /home/ga/geoserver is the GeoServer home directory. The cache/countries subdirectory is a reasonable location for GeoWebCache tiles. Consistent across setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.

Code verification: setup_geoserver.sh line 114 (import to ne_countries table) and line 185 (publish as ne_countries) in the 'ne' workspace. GeoServer layer naming convention: workspace:layer creates ne:ne_countries. Confirmed in gwc_tile_cache_seeding task.json metadata also uses 'target_layer': 'ne:ne_countries'. Multiple tasks reference this layer consistently.

Mathematical verification: For zoom levels 0-3, maximum theoretical tiles are 1+4+16+64=85. The ne_110m_admin_0_countries dataset covers the entire world with 258 countries, ensuring tiles will be generated across the grid. A minimum of 10 tiles is conservative and reasonable for a global dataset seeded at low zoom levels. The verifier.py line 98 enforces this threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a dedicated GeoWebCache BlobStore for the Natural Earth countries layer (ne:ne_countries) in GeoServer. The layer is a real, verified feature type in the 'ne' workspace backed by the ne_110m_admin_0_countries PostGIS table (258 countries at 1:110m scale). The BlobStore name 'countries_store' and path '/home/ga/geoserver/cache/countries' are task-specific identifiers. The minimum tile count threshold of 10 for zoom levels 0-3 is conservative and appropriate for global tile seeding of country boundaries.
